key_factors: The conflict remains in its early stage with no territorial losses, no military momentum favoring the aggressor, and a stabilized frontline due to defensive advantages. Sanctions are moderate (20%) and already impacting the aggressor’s economy, potentially limiting escalation. The smaller power is actively coordinating with major allies (Valkoria, Meridian, Aurelia) on military aid, humanitarian access, and diplomatic frameworks. A neutral power has proposed a peace framework, and prisoner exchanges/humanitarian corridors are under negotiation—indicating early de-escalation signals. While the military balance slightly favors the aggressor (–0.05), this is not operationally significant at this stage. There is no indication of internal political fractures within the smaller power.
